blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I wrote the thing in my journal.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: The messy version thing. I put it at the top of a new page.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I said I would. I didn't tell you that to be polite.
I didn't know what to say back to that so I just read it twice.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Also thank you for Friday. That was a good decision.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Mine for asking. Yours for saying yes.
I put my phone in my pocket and walked the rest of the way to school with it still warm in my hand. The week had this different weight to it now — not heavier. More like real.
